categories.label: Identity & advertising
categories.description: Prevent advertising tracking and profiling by Google, Samsung, and third-party ad networks.

checks.title: Delete the advertising ID
checks.risk: A unique identifier used by ad networks to build your profile across all apps.
checks.whyItMatters: Since Android 12, you can fully delete this ID instead of just resetting it.

checks.title: Turn off Google personalized ads
checks.risk: Without this step, Google uses your history to target ads across its services.

categories.label: Samsung Account
categories.description: Limit data sharing with Samsung through your account.

checks.title: Turn off Samsung Account personalization
checks.risk: Samsung collects your usage history to "personalize" its services (Galaxy Store recommendations, Samsung Daily, etc.).
checks.whyItMatters: This setting is enabled by default when the Samsung account is created.

categories.label: Network & sovereign DNS
categories.description: Encrypt your DNS queries and choose an operator that does not sell your data.

checks.title: Enable a sovereign private DNS
checks.risk: Without private DNS, your ISP sees every site you visit, even over HTTPS.
checks.whyItMatters: Private DNS (DoT) encrypts these queries and routes them to an operator you choose.

steps.label: Open connection settings
steps.fallbackPath: Settings > Connections > More connection settings > Private DNS

steps.label: Enter the recommended hostname for your country

checks.title: Disable always-on Wi-Fi/Bluetooth scanning
checks.risk: Android continuously scans Wi-Fi and Bluetooth networks to improve location, even when you don't use them.

categories.label: Voice assistants & keyboard
categories.description: Prevent permanent listening and typing-data collection.

checks.title: Turn off Bixby voice wake-up
checks.risk: With voice wake-up enabled, the microphone is always listening for "Hi Bixby".
checks.whyItMatters: Even if you don't use Bixby, the service can stay active in the background.

steps.label: Tap the menu icon > Settings > Voice wake-up

checks.title: Turn off "Hey Google"
checks.risk: With the Google hotword enabled, the microphone is also always listening.

steps.label: Open the Google app, then Settings > Google Assistant
Go to "Hey Google & Voice Match" and turn it off

checks.title: Turn off Samsung Keyboard personalization
checks.risk: Samsung Keyboard can send typing data to Samsung to "improve" suggestions.

steps.label: Open Samsung Keyboard settings
steps.fallbackPath: Settings > General management > Samsung Keyboard > Personalized data

categories.label: Background Samsung services
categories.description: Disable Samsung services that collect or transmit data in the background.

checks.title: Turn off Samsung Customization Service
checks.risk: This service collects your usage history (apps opened, frequency, preferences) to feed Samsung recommendations.
checks.whyItMatters: Enabled by default on most Galaxy devices. No functional impact when disabled.

checks.title: Limit Samsung Push Service
checks.risk: Samsung Push Service keeps a permanent connection to Samsung servers for notifications from their apps (Galaxy Store, Samsung Pay, etc.).

steps.label: Restrict background data and battery, or disable if you don't use Samsung apps

checks.title: Disable Game Optimizing Service (GOS)
checks.risk: GOS throttles performance for apps identified as games and collects usage data.
checks.whyItMatters: Controversial: Samsung was fined in South Korea in 2022 over its GOS practices.

steps.label: Disable if possible, otherwise revoke permissions and force stop

categories.label: Diagnostics & reports
categories.description: Stop automatic error and diagnostic reports from being sent to Samsung.

checks.title: Turn off Samsung diagnostics
checks.risk: Samsung continuously collects usage and error reports containing information about your device and habits.

steps.label: Turn off "Send usage data" if present

categories.label: App permissions
categories.description: Check that no app has unjustified access to your microphone, camera, or location.

checks.title: Audit sensitive permissions
checks.risk: Some apps keep microphone, camera, or background location access far beyond what they need.

steps.label: Open the permission manager
steps.fallbackPath: Settings > Security and privacy > Permission manager

steps.label: Go through each category (Microphone, Camera, Location) and restrict suspicious apps
